title: Plasma Exosome Isolation
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"dhla1","text":"This protocol details methods for the isolation of small extracellular vesicles from plasma. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"dfuv6","text":"Please refer to the Safety Data Sheets (SDS) for health and environmental hazards.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"fp5ed","text":"Materials","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":9}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"c2j5m","text":"13mm sterile syringe filters with a 0.8 µm Supor (PES) membrane","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"cnpl6","text":"13mm sterile syringe filters with 0.2 mm Supor (PES) membrane","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"cc9r2","text":"1X PBS","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2k99t","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"cov6h","text":"Equipment","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":9}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9l20c","text":"Ultracentrifuge","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Incubate plasma samples (starting volume: 1-1.5ml) On ice for complete thaw.
Filter samples through a 13mm sterile syringe filters with a 0.8 µm Supor (PES) membrane.
Centrifuge at 20000 x g, 4 °C, 1 hour to remove large extracellular vesicles.
Collect the supernatant and filter it through 13mm sterile syringe filters with 0.2 mm Supor (PES) membrane.
Centrifuge at 100000 x g, 4 °C, 1 hour to pellet small extracellular vesicles.

Remove the supernatant, resuspend the pellet in 1 mL, 1X PBS and repeat the previous step (repeated again in the next step for convenience). This step is optional, according the final application of the pellet.
Process the pellet according to the type of analysis.
Centrifuge at 100000 x g, 4 °C, 1 hour to pellet small extracellular vesicles.
creator: Sofia Koletsi
